title: Sound Cylinder Match
description: A Montessori-inspired sound-cylinder game where identical shaker cards are matched by listening.
learningGoals: Build auditory memory across multiple mystery shakers
Match by sound rather than by sight
interactionModel: match-pairs tap two visually identical shaker cards and compare their spoken sound
feedbackModel: Correct same-sound pairs sparkle and speak the matched sound; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and retry.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
